name: NUTTER-XMD
description: NUTTER-XMD — A powerful WhatsApp multi-device bot. Deploy your own instance.

SESSION_ID.description: Your WhatsApp session ID. Get this from the pairing page at the bot owner's website.

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Your WhatsApp phone number in international format (e.g. 254712345678). This is the bot owner/deployer number.

ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Password for the admin dashboard. Required to access /admin. Choose a strong password.

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string (auto-populated by the Heroku PostgreSQL add-on).

BOT_NAME.description: The name your bot will display.

PREFIX.description: The command prefix character (e.g. . or !). Default is dot (.).
